verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let the Eagles rise, let them shout and sing For the Word they've heard, renews within For the Lord Himself, came with a shout Hear the voice of Life, spread your wings and fly

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It's the Rising of the Son Spread your Wings, soar to the sky They shall mount up with wings as eagles

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: They shall rise up with wings as eagles They shall run and not weary They'll walk and not faint They shall mount up with wings as eagles
